title: Evotrochis gaubaeana
taxonomy: Evotrochis gaubaeana is a species of orchid, and within the kingdom Plantae, it is classified as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Monocots, order - Asparagales, family - Diurideae, subfamily - Drakaeoideae, tribe - Drakaeae, genus - Evotrochis, species - E. gaubaeana. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and genetic makeup. As a member of the Asparagales order, Evotrochis gaubaeana is closely related to other orchids in this order. The specific classification of Evotrochis gaubaeana is subject to ongoing research and refinement. Further studies may provide more detailed information about the plant's classification and relationships to other species.
uses: Evotrochis gaubaeana is a rare orchid species that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties. However, its actual medicinal uses are not well-documented.
